meta.system: Extract each candidate exception rule as JSON. For the anomaly "suable(state_agency)", list the candidate rules. Reply O
meta.user:
Facts: entity(private_corp), entity(state_agency), sovereign(state_agency).
General rules (=> means "normally implies"): r_suable: entity(X) => suable(X); r_liable: entity(X) => liable_for_damages(X).
